title: Translate the set into ≥1 agreed target language
context: After ≥25 plain-language source descriptions are produced and reviewed (produce-001), the descriptions must be translated into at least one agreed target language to complete M2's definition of done. Translations use the language-pair glossary (glossary-002 or the appropriate glossary) and must pass qualified bilingual reviewer sign-off. The output license for each translation must be compatible with the partner grant and never more permissive than the source.
objective: Translate all ≥25 reviewed source descriptions into ≥1 agreed target language: apply the appropriate language-pair glossary throughout; preserve all proper nouns, dates, materials, and period terms per the glossary's preserve/transliterate/do-not-translate conventions; preserve plain-ness in the target language; flag all uncertainty with UNCERTAIN tags in review.yaml; and obtain qualified bilingual reviewer sign-off for each translation recorded in review.yaml and the PR.
acceptanceCriteria: All ≥25 source descriptions from produce-001 are translated into ≥1 agreed target language
Appropriate language-pair glossary applied throughout: glossary terms used consistently, proper nouns handled per preserve/transliterate/do-not-translate conventions
Plain-ness preserved in the target language: translations are label-sized, clear, and jargon-free for a general visitor reading in the target language
All agent UNCERTAIN flags captured in review.yaml agentFlags before review; grounding flags trigger claim review in the source description, not translation of a potentially erroneous claim

Qualified bilingual reviewer for each target language (native or near-native competence with heritage-translation experience) signs off in the PR and review.yaml; reviewer independent of translator, COI declared
Per-translation attribution/credit line and output license (compatible with the partner grant and source rights; never more permissive) recorded in attribution.txt for each translated description
license-002 CI check passes for all translated deliverables
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-produce-001 (reviewed source descriptions — must be complete)
multilingual-museum-labels-glossary-002 (2nd language pair glossary, or appropriate glossary)
output: objects/<objectId>/descriptions/<tgt-lang>.md for all ≥25 partner objects in ≥1 agreed target language; updated review.yaml and attribution.txt for each object
